name: quant-finance-workflow
description: Repo-local Codex workflow, research, and implementation skill bundle for the finance workspace in quant-data-pipeline.

interface.shortDescription: Finance workspace research and implementation skills
interface.longDescription: Repo-local plugin bundle for finance task intake, product direction research, benchmark research, feature opportunity synthesis, documentation sync, integration review, runbook maintenance, Backtest UI work, DB ingestion, factor generation, and strategy implementation in quant-data-pipeline.
defaultPrompt: Classify a finance request and choose the right skill.
Audit the finance product and identify sourced feature opportunities.
Review a finance integration or merge result.
